feature.name: SQL parse and split core
feature.description: Extract sqlparse's SQL statement parsing and multi-statement splitting behavior as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: parse SQL text into Statement token trees
split multi-statement SQL scripts while respecting strings, comments, and nesting
preserve statement-splitting behavior for semicolons inside quotes and comments
excluded_behaviors: token tree navigation helpers beyond basic parse output
packaging metadata from the original project

entanglement.description: SQL parse and split behavior depends on tokenizer state, statement-splitting passes, and grouping rules spread across multiple modules.
signals: grouped token tree data model for split boundaries
public API hides a multi-module runtime closure

output.import: from featurelifted import parse, parsestream, split
output.signature: parse(sql: str, encoding: str | None = None) -> tuple[Statement, ...]
